parameters.command:
CPU=$(top -bn1 | grep 'Cpu(s)' | awk '{print $2}' | cut -d'%' -f1 | tr -d ' ,')
RAM_USED=$(free | awk '/^Mem:/{printf "%.0f", $3/$2*100}')
DISK=$(df / | awk 'NR==2{printf "%.0f", $5}' | tr -d '%')

FORESTAI=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8010/health 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
BISONTE=$(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -c ':9000' || echo "0")
WHATSAPP=$(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -c ':3001' || echo "0")
FORESTAI_DOCKER=$(docker ps --filter name=forestai-poc --format '{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'Up' || echo "0")

ALERTS=""
STATUS="ok"

CPU_INT=$(printf "%.0f" ${CPU:-0} 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
[ "${CPU_INT:-0}" -gt 80 ] && ALERTS="${ALERTS}🔴 CPU: ${CPU}% (umbral 80%)\n" && STATUS="alert"
[ "${RAM_USED:-0}" -gt 85 ] && ALERTS="${ALERTS}🔴 RAM: ${RAM_USED}% (umbral 85%)\n" && STATUS="alert"
[ "${DISK:-0}" -gt 80 ] && ALERTS="${ALERTS}🔴 Disco: ${DISK}% (umbral 80%)\n" && STATUS="alert"
[ "$FORESTAI_DOCKER" -eq 0 ] && ALERTS="${ALERTS}🔴 ForestAI Docker CAIDO\n" && STATUS="alert"
[ "${BISONTE:-0}" -eq 0 ] && ALERTS="${ALERTS}🟡 Expreso Bisonte :9000 CAIDO\n" && STATUS="alert"
[ "${WHATSAPP:-0}" -eq 0 ] && ALERTS="${ALERTS}🔴 WhatsApp Gateway :3001 CAIDO\n" && STATUS="alert"

printf '{"status":"%s","alerts":"%s","cpu":"%s","ram":"%s","disk":"%s","forestai_docker":"%s","bisonte":"%s","whatsapp":"%s"}' \
  "$STATUS" "$ALERTS" "${CPU:-?}" "${RAM_USED:-?}" "${DISK:-?}" "$FORESTAI_DOCKER" "${BISONTE:-0}" "${WHATSAPP:-0}"
